users.biography:
Hi, I’m a tech enthusiast and I have a lot of second-hand gadgets.
You’re welcome to check them out!
Hi, I’m Romi I love fashion and tech, and I sell high-quality second-hand items in great condition. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

posts.title: Oak Wood Table
posts.description: Beautiful oak wood table in excellent condition. Sturdy, durable, and with a timeless natural finish. Perfect for dining or as a stylish centerpiece for your home.

posts.title: White Dinnerware Set
posts.description: Elegant white dinnerware set in great condition. Classic and versatile design, perfect for everyday use or hosting. Clean, well maintained, and ready to use.

posts.title: Bosch Refrigerator
posts.description: High-quality Bosch refrigerator in excellent condition. Spacious, reliable, and energy-efficient – perfect for everyday use. Well maintained and fully functional.

posts.title: Vintage Levi's Jacket
posts.description: Great condition denim jacket from the 80s

posts.title: Classic Luxury Style
posts.description: A timeless and elegant Prada handbag crafted from premium leather, featuring a structured silhouette and iconic design. Perfect for a sophisticated and polished look.

posts.title: Comfort Sofa
posts.description: Elegant gray three-seat sofa, designed for comfort and style. Features soft fabric upholstery, plush cushioned seats and backrests, rolled arms, and decorative nailhead trim for a classic luxury look. A perfect addition to any living room, offering both durability and timeless charm.

posts.title: iPad
posts.description: A versatile and powerful tablet designed by Apple, perfect for work, study, and entertainment. Features a sleek design, high-resolution display, and smooth performance for browsing, streaming, note-taking, and more. Ideal for everyday use at home or on the go.

posts.title: Pink Prom Dress
posts.description: An elegant and feminine pink prom dress, perfect for special occasions and formal events. Designed with a flattering silhouette, it may feature luxurious fabrics like satin, chiffon, or tulle, along with stylish details such as sequins, lace, or a high slit. A timeless and eye-catching choice for a glamorous evening look.

posts.title: Rolex Watch
posts.description: Vintage Rolex watch in excellent condition, crafted with timeless elegance and exceptional quality. This classic timepiece features a refined design, reliable movement, and the prestigious craftsmanship Rolex is known for. Perfect for collectors or anyone looking for a sophisticated luxury watch with history, character, and lasting value.

posts.title: iPhone 15
posts.description: A sleek and powerful smartphone from Apple, featuring a 6.1-inch Super Retina XDR display, advanced 48MP camera, and the fast A16 Bionic chip. Designed with a modern look and USB-C connectivity, it delivers smooth performance, high-quality photos, and all-day battery life perfect for everyday use.

posts.title: Camping Tent
posts.description: A durable and easy-to-set-up camping tent, perfect for outdoor trips and adventures. Provides reliable protection from wind and light rain, with good ventilation for a comfortable sleeping experience. Ideal for camping, hiking, and travel.

posts.title: Cool guitar !!!!
posts.description: the coolest guitar, old but new !

posts.title: Moana Movie
posts.description: Moana (DVD) – A fun and adventurous Disney animated movie about a brave girl who sets out on a journey across the ocean to save her people. Perfect for the whole family!

posts.title: Gucci Heals
posts.description: The mist Beutiful heels !!!

posts.title: 1960s Levi's 501 Selvedge Jeans
posts.description: Original pair of 1960s Levi's 501 jeans with selvedge denim. Big-E red tab. Some natural fading adds character. Waist 32, length 34.

posts.title: Victorian Brass Desk Lamp
posts.description: Elegant brass desk lamp from the late Victorian era. Green glass shade with patina base. Fully rewired for modern use. Height 45cm.

posts.title: 1950s Ray-Ban Wayfarer Sunglasses
posts.description: Classic original Ray-Ban Wayfarer sunglasses from the 1950s. Tortoiseshell frame with original green lenses. Minor scratches on one lens.

posts.title: Art Deco Diamond Brooch
posts.description: Stunning Art Deco diamond and platinum brooch, circa 1925. Geometric design with 0.8ct total diamond weight. Comes with original velvet box.

posts.title: Mid-Century Teak Coffee Table
posts.description: Scandinavian design teak coffee table from the 1960s. Clean lines, tapered legs. Some surface marks consistent with age. 120cm x 55cm.

posts.title: 1970s Polaroid SX-70 Camera
posts.description: Iconic Polaroid SX-70 folding SLR instant camera in chrome and tan leather. Fully functional, tested with film. A real conversation piece.

posts.title: First Edition 'The Great Gatsby'
posts.description: 1925 first edition of F. Scott Fitzgerald's The Great Gatsby. Some foxing on pages, binding tight. Dust jacket is a later reproduction.

posts.title: 1940s Hermes Silk Scarf
posts.description: Beautiful silk scarf by Hermes featuring an equestrian motif. Vibrant colors still intact. Hand-rolled edges. 90cm x 90cm.

posts.title: Bauhaus Steel Tube Chair
posts.description: Marcel Breuer inspired cantilever chair with chrome tubular steel frame and black leather seat. Excellent structural integrity.

posts.title: 1980s Casio G-Shock DW-5000C
posts.description: The original G-Shock from 1983. Square face, digital display. Battery replaced recently. Some wear on the resin band but fully functional.

posts.title: Oil Painting – Parisian Street Scene
posts.description: Original oil on canvas depicting a rainy Parisian boulevard. Signed by the artist. Gilt frame included. 60cm x 80cm.

posts.title: 1950s Chanel Tweed Jacket
posts.description: Classic Chanel boucle tweed jacket in pastel pink. Gold-tone buttons with CC logo. Silk lining. French size 38.

posts.title: Edwardian Pearl Necklace
posts.description: Graduated natural pearl necklace with a gold clasp. 42cm length. Warm ivory lustre. Comes with a gemological certificate.

posts.title: 1970s Pioneer SX-780 Receiver
posts.description: Vintage Pioneer stereo receiver. 45 watts per channel, warm analog sound. Wood veneer cabinet. Serviced with new capacitors.

posts.title: Signed Hemingway 'The Old Man and the Sea'
posts.description: First edition signed by Ernest Hemingway. Slight wear on dust jacket spine. Pages clean and bright. A prized collector's item.

posts.title: 1930s Art Deco Cocktail Shaker
posts.description: Chrome-plated Art Deco cocktail shaker with geometric engravings. Built-in strainer. Polished to a mirror finish. 28cm tall.

posts.title: 1960s Mod Mini Dress – Mary Quant Style
posts.description: Bold geometric print mini dress in orange and white. Zip-back closure. True 1960s mod fashion. UK size 10.

posts.title: Murano Glass Vase – Sommerso Technique
posts.description: Hand-blown Murano glass vase using the sommerso submerged color technique. Deep blue core with amber outer layer. 30cm tall.

posts.title: 1940s Military Field Watch
posts.description: WWII-era military field watch with manual-wind movement. Radium dial numerals, canvas strap. Keeps accurate time after servicing.

posts.title: Eames Lounge Chair Replica (1970s)
posts.description: High-quality 1970s replica of the iconic Eames lounge chair. Rosewood veneer shell, black leather cushions. Ottoman included.

posts.title: 1920s Flapper Beaded Evening Bag
posts.description: Exquisite hand-beaded evening bag from the Roaring Twenties. Silver and black glass beads. Silver-tone frame with kiss-lock closure.

posts.title: Sony Walkman TPS-L2 (1979)
posts.description: The original Sony Walkman that started a revolution. Blue and silver. Includes original headphones. Belt clip intact. Plays tapes perfectly.

posts.title: Vintage Persian Tabriz Rug
posts.description: Hand-knotted Persian Tabriz rug with intricate floral medallion design. Rich reds and navy blues. 200cm x 300cm. Minor edge wear.

posts.title: 1950s Bakelite Bangle Set
posts.description: Set of 5 marbled Bakelite bangles in butterscotch, red, and green. All test positive for genuine Bakelite. Great stacking set.

posts.title: Vintage 'Brave New World' First UK Edition
posts.description: Aldous Huxley's Brave New World, first UK edition by Chatto & Windus, 1932. Yellow cloth boards. Some shelf wear but text block solid.

posts.title: 1970s Gucci Jackie Bag
posts.description: Iconic Gucci Jackie hobo bag in tan leather with signature piston-lock closure. Gold hardware. Interior suede lining. Some patina on leather.

posts.title: Japanese Woodblock Print – Hokusai Wave
posts.description: Meiji-era restrike of Hokusai's Great Wave off Kanagawa. Woodblock on washi paper. Framed in simple black wood. 35cm x 25cm.

posts.title: 1980s Members Only Racer Jacket
posts.description: Classic Members Only jacket in navy blue. Snap-tab collar, ribbed cuffs and waistband. Size medium. The quintessential 80s jacket.

posts.title: 1960s Rotary Telephone – Red
posts.description: Bright red rotary dial telephone from the 1960s. Heavy Bakelite body. Fully functional when connected to a landline. A retro statement piece.

posts.title: Antique Silver Pocket Watch
posts.description: Sterling silver hunter-case pocket watch with Roman numeral dial. Key-wind movement runs smoothly. Hallmarked Birmingham 1885.

posts.title: 1970s Velvet Bell-Bottom Pants
posts.description: Crushed velvet bell-bottoms in deep burgundy. High waist, wide flare. Size 28 waist. Perfect for a disco revival look.

posts.title: Art Nouveau Bronze Figurine
posts.description: Bronze figurine of a dancing woman in flowing dress. Art Nouveau styling. Dark patina. Marble base. Signed. 35cm tall.

posts.title: 1940s Swing Era Fedora Hat
posts.description: Men's felt fedora in charcoal grey with a wide grosgrain ribbon band. Worn brim for an authentic vintage look. Size 7 1/4.

posts.title: Chippendale Mahogany Side Table
posts.description: George III-style mahogany side table with ball-and-claw feet. Single drawer with brass pull. Rich warm patina. 65cm x 45cm x 72cm.

posts.title: Vintage Turquoise and Silver Ring
posts.description: Navajo-crafted sterling silver ring with natural turquoise stone. Handmade with stamp work detail on the band. Size 8.

posts.title: 1990s Gameboy Color – Teal
posts.description: Nintendo Gameboy Color in teal/turquoise. Screen is bright and clear. Includes Tetris cartridge. Battery cover intact.

posts.title: 1930s Depression Glass Dessert Set
posts.description: Set of 6 pink Depression-era glass dessert bowls in the Cherry Blossom pattern. All pieces in excellent condition, no chips or cracks.

posts.title: 1950s Dior 'New Look' Skirt Suit
posts.description: Stunning cream wool skirt suit in the iconic Dior New Look silhouette. Nipped waist, full skirt. Minor moth repair on sleeve lining.

posts.title: Antique Map – Mediterranean 1780
posts.description: Hand-colored copperplate engraving of the Mediterranean Sea, circa 1780. Latin text cartouche. Framed under UV glass. 50cm x 70cm.

posts.title: 1960s Omega Seamaster De Ville
posts.description: Gold-capped Omega Seamaster De Ville with silver sunburst dial. Cal. 562 automatic movement. Recently serviced. 34mm case.

posts.title: Leather-Bound Encyclopedia Britannica (1911)
posts.description: Complete 11th edition, 29 volumes. Full calf leather binding with gilt spines. The legendary 'Scholar's Edition'. Some foxing on endpapers.

posts.title: 1980s Versace Silk Shirt
posts.description: Bold baroque-print silk shirt by Gianni Versace. Gold Medusa buttons. Italian size 50 (US L). Quintessential 80s luxury.

posts.title: Vintage Globe Bar Cabinet
posts.description: Italian-made globe bar on a carved wooden stand. Opens to reveal a fitted interior for bottles and glasses. 45cm diameter globe.

posts.title: Amber and Gold Victorian Brooch
posts.description: Natural Baltic amber cabochon set in 9ct gold with seed pearl surround. Warm honey color with insect inclusion visible. Hallmarked 1880.

posts.title: 1970s Technics SL-1200 Turntable
posts.description: The legendary Technics SL-1200 MK2 direct-drive turntable. Near mint condition. Includes dust cover and original Technics headshell.

posts.title: 1950s Fiesta Ware Pitcher – Red
posts.description: Vintage Fiesta Ware disc water pitcher in original radioactive red glaze. No chips or hairline cracks. Homer Laughlin stamp on base.

posts.title: 1940s Leather Bomber Jacket – Type A-2
posts.description: WWII-era Type A-2 flight jacket in horsehide leather. Beautiful wear and patina. Knit cuffs and waistband intact. Size 40.

posts.title: Andy Warhol 'Flowers' Lithograph
posts.description: Offset lithograph from the 1964 Flowers series. Vibrant colors on heavy stock paper. Unsigned, from a large edition. 60cm x 60cm.

posts.title: Copper Moscow Mule Mug Set (1950s)
posts.description: Set of 4 original copper Moscow Mule mugs with brass handles. Beautiful natural patina. Each holds 500ml. Made in USA.

posts.title: 1960s Psychedelic Concert Poster
posts.description: Original Fillmore West concert poster advertising Jimi Hendrix, 1968. Psychedelic art by Wes Wilson. Vibrant neon colors on heavy stock. 50cm x 70cm.
